Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "john_doe" as the username.
2. Enter "password123" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User enters incorrect username or password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "john_doe" as the username.
2. Enter "wrong_password" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect login credentials.

Title: User logs out successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: User attempts to log out without being logged in
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps: 1. Click the logout button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is not logged in.

Title: User views a product
Preconditions: User is logged in and a product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "T-shirt" as the product name.
2. Click the view button.
Expected Result: Product details are displayed.

Title: User tries to view a non-existent product
Preconditions: User is logged in but the product does not exist.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "NonExistentProduct" as the product name.
2. Click the view button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User adds a product to the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and a product exists.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "T-shirt" as the product name.
2. Enter "29.99" as the price.
3. Click the add to cart button.
Expected Result: The product is added to the cart.

Title: User tries to add a non-existent product to the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in but the product does not exist.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "NonExistentProduct" as the product name.
2. Enter "29.99" as the price.
3. Click the add to cart button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User removes a product from the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and a product is in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "T-shirt" as the product name.
2. Click the remove from cart button.
Expected Result: The product is removed from the cart.

Title: User tries to remove a non-existent product from the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in but the product is not in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "NonExistentProduct" as the product name.
2. Click the remove from cart button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the product is not in the cart.

Title: User checks out from the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and the cart contains at least one product.
Test Steps: 1. Click the checkout button.
Expected Result: The checkout process is initiated and the user is redirected to the payment page.

Title: User tries to checkout with an empty cart
Preconditions: User is logged in but the cart is empty.
Test Steps: 1. Click the checkout button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the cart is empty.

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Preconditions: Admin has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "admin_user" as the username.
2. Enter "admin_password" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Admin is logged in successfully and redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: Admin logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: Admin enters incorrect username or password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "admin_user" as the username.
2. Enter "wrong_password" as the password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect login credentials.

Title: Admin updates a product
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and a product exists.
Test Data:
- Product name: T-shirt
- New description: Updated T-shirt description
Test Steps:
1. Enter "T-shirt" as the product name.
2. Enter "Updated T-shirt description" as the new description.
3. Click the update button.
Expected Result: The product description is updated successfully.

Title: Admin tries to update a non-existent product
Preconditions: Admin is logged in but the product does not exist.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "NonExistentProduct" as the product name.
2. Enter "Updated T-shirt description" as the new description.
3. Click the update button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User navigates through the home selection
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Select "Yes" to proceed.
2. Select "No" to proceed.
3. Select "Note" to proceed.
4. Select "Ritmo alla home" to proceed.
Expected Result: The user navigates through the home selection process successfully.

Title: User selects an invalid option

Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating an invalid selection.
